76+14.llm_explanation: To add 76 and 14 in base-9, we first convert them to base-10: 76 (base-9) = 7*9^1 + 6*9^0 = 63 + 6 = 69 (base-10) and 14 (base-9) = 1*9^1 + 4*9^0 = 9 + 4 = 13 (base-10). Adding these gives 69 + 13 = 82 (base-10). Now, we convert 82 back to base-9: 82 ÷ 9 = 9 remainder 1, and 9 ÷ 9 = 1 remainder 0, so 82 (base-10) = 101 (base-9). Thus, the answer is 91 in base-9.**
